utterances.speaker: Mr. Franklin
utterances.text: Okay , I hear you loud and clear . Bob will stay put .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I think it is best sir .

utterances.speaker: Mr. Franklin
utterances.text: But we really do need to find someone up here .

utterances.speaker: Mr. Franklin
utterances.text: The work is starting to pile up .

utterances.speaker: Mr. Franklin
utterances.text: I have got a stack of documents on my desk this high .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: You know what you should do , just toss em in the shedder and claim you never got em .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: What does a guy have to do to be taken seriously around here ? !

emotion_cause.span: 8_What does a guy have to do to be taken seriously around here ? !
